cross_cutting.title: rand 0.7.3 cannot be upgraded — blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream
cross_cutting.note: Blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream. Removed from V1.6 scope per V1.6 delivery compass decision.

2026-05-23-v1.26-narrative-kb-persistenc.title: db_err maps all sqlx::Error to ValidationError — no Storage variant
2026-05-23-v1.26-narrative-kb-persistenc.note: Introduce NarrativeError::Storage or Database variant in post-1.0 hardening.

2026-05-23-v1.26-narrative-kb-persistenc.title: KbQuery fetches all blocks into memory then filters in Rust — no DB-level pagination
2026-05-23-v1.26-narrative-kb-persistenc.note: Add LIMIT to list_by_world when needed for scale.

2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.title: body.md written before SQL INSERT — orphaned files on DB failure
2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.note: Wrap in transaction or write body after SQL INSERT in post-1.0 hardening.

2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.title: list_references returns all rows unbounded — no pagination
2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.note: Acceptable for pre-release volume. Add LIMIT/OFFSET when needed.

2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.title: content_hash always NULL — integrity field unused
2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.note: Optional static hash in V1.27 hygiene plan H4.1; full refresh pipeline is DF-44.

2026-05-25-v1.28-context-and-agent-host.title: Persistent child processes survive daemon crash — Drop does not kill
2026-05-25-v1.28-context-and-agent-host.note: Add Drop impl with start_kill() for persistent child. Low risk in pre-release local-only daemon.

2026-05-25-v1.28-context-and-agent-host.title: Persistent mode cancel() is a no-op — stuck operations require timeout
2026-05-25-v1.28-context-and-agent-host.note: Implement cancel() to kill child or drain stdin. Acceptable in pre-release.

2026-05-25-v1.28-context-and-agent-host.title: split_stage0_personality uses markdown-header heuristic — brittle to future formatting changes
2026-05-25-v1.28-context-and-agent-host.note: Test-covered for current format. Consider structured delimiter if stage0 format evolves.
